title: Exochaenium dimidiatum

It belongs to the genus Exochaenium, which is a group of orchids commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species is characterized by its unique morphology and is often associated with other orchid species in the same genus. The classification of Exochaenium dimidiatum is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which have helped to clarify its relationships with other members of the Orchidaceae family.
